title: baphia capparidifolia subsp. polygalacea
intro: Baphia capparidifolia subsp. polygalacea, a species within the pea family, is a type of flowering plant. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Baphia capparidifolia subsp. polygalacea include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations like teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
